mentions.note: Operational turnaround under CEO JK Symancyk: simplified to 4 core brands (Zales, Jared), strong cash flow ($525M, +20% YoY), digital/store experience investments. Lab-grown diamonds +20% penetration. Stock +58% past 12 months, transitioning to quality retailer story.
Excellent barometer of consumer health with purely discretionary inventory; Tuesday results will signal strength of middle and high-income consumers.
